name: rp2040_adc_loopback_s3jtag
notes: RP2040 ADC loopback test. GPIO22 is jumpered to GPIO26/ADC0. Firmware drives GPIO22 HIGH then LOW, reads ADC0 each time, and reports PASS via mailbox if high_avg > 3800 and low_avg < 300. detail0 = (high_avg << 16) | low_avg.

bench_setup.notes: Requires SWDIO, SWCLK, GND, plus one jumper wire: RP2040 GPIO22 -> RP2040 GPIO26.

peripheral_signals.notes: ADC input. Receives voltage driven by GPIO22 via jumper.
Digital output driver. Jumpered to GPIO26/ADC0.
Visual only. Toggles after mailbox result is written.
